segments.text: Hello everyone, thank you guys for coming to our weekly student success meeting
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: And let's just get started
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: So I have our list of chronically absent students here and I've been noticing a troubling trend
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: A lot of students are skipping on Fridays. Does anyone have any idea what's going on?
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: I've heard some of my mentees talking about how it's really hard to get out of bed on Fridays
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: It might be good if we did something like a pancake breakfast to encourage them to come. I think that's a great idea
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: Let's try that next week
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: It might also be because a lot of students have been getting sick now that it's getting colder outside
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: I've had a number of students come by my office with symptoms like sniffling and coughing
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: We should put up posters with tips for not getting sick since it's almost flu season
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: Like, you know wash your hands after the bathroom stuff like that
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: I think that's a good idea and it'll be a good reminder for the teachers as well
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: So one other thing I wanted to talk about
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: There's a student I've noticed here John Smith. He's missed seven days already and it's only November
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: Does anyone have an idea what's going on with him? I might be able to fill in the gaps there
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: I talked to John today and he's really stressed out
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: He's been dealing with helping his parents take care of his younger siblings during the day
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: It might actually be a good idea if he spoke to the guidance counselor a little bit
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: I can talk to John today if you want to send him to my office after you meet with him
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: It's a lot to deal with for a middle schooler
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: Great. Thanks, and and I can help out with the family's childcare needs. I'll look for some free or low-cost
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: Resources in the community to share with John and he can share them with his family great. Well some really good ideas here today
segments.speaker: Unknown 1

segments.text: Thanks for coming. And if no one has anything else, I think we can wrap up
segments.speaker: Unknown 1
